text:
Certainly. One soft summer evening, I wandered into the small town's bookstore, finding the warm lighting comforting.

As I wandered deeper into the cozy corners, I stumbled upon a dusty old album. It appeared harmless enough, just an album cataloging rare bird songs. I couldnd't resist.

Reading the words listing the songs thrilled me.

Whooo!

Whoo!

From that moment on, I couldnd stop listening.

And listen weoosely?
